description_long: This object is a whole zucchini, characterized by its elongated, cylindrical shape with a slightly bulbous end and a rough, green stem. The skin is dark green with lighter green and yellowish vertical streaks and subtle speckling, giving it a mottled appearance. The surface texture appears semi-soft and slightly ridged, with visible striations running lengthwise along the body. The stem end is rough and knobby, while the opposite end is more rounded and smooth. The zucchini's skin has a matte to slightly glossy finish, and the overall form is slightly curved. There are no visible blemishes, stickers, or labels on the surface.
description: A whole, dark green zucchini with light streaks, a rough stem, and a slightly curved, cylindrical shape.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, curved body, and both the rough stem and rounded end.
description_view_1: View from the stem end, highlighting the knobby, rough texture and the ridged surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the elongated body and the rounded, smooth end.
description_view_3: View from the rounded end, showing the circular base and the subtle mottling of the skin.
attribute_orientation: lying horizontally with the stem on the left and the rounded end on the right
